# numpy 2.5.x requires Python >=3.12 but the dashboard box venv runs 3.11
# (PR#421's lockfile was compiled on a 3.12 resolver — the 2026-07-17 #468
# merge-deploy was the first requirements-touching deploy since, and pip
# failed on-box). 2.4.6 installs on 3.11 AND CI's 3.12. Remove this ceiling
# when the box venv moves to 3.12 (tracked parity issue; mirrors the Node-22
# cutover config-I2711) — recompile the lockfile with a --python-version
# matching the box until then.
